moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)

### **Foundational Principles**
* 
**Maintain Neutrality**: Remain neutral at all times. Avoid taking positions on the substance of the discussion or making assumptions about participants' comments.


* 
**Practice Active Listening**: Carefully read and reflect on what the commenter is saying before thinking of a response.


* 
**Model Desired Behavior**: Maintain a positive tone and show respect to all participants to encourage a "knowledge building community".


* 
**Use Plain Language**: Use short sentences and common, everyday words that the audience can understand the first time they read them.



### **Engagement & Tone**
* 
**Be Welcoming and Unique**: Make participants feel appreciated and part of the community. Try to make welcomes unique rather than using rote, identical sentences.


* 
**Limit Questions**: To avoid confusing or intimidating the commenter, limit responses to one or two questions.


* 
**Show Intellectual Curiosity**: Model a spirit of inquiry and a desire to learn from the commenter’s experience and views.



### **Facilitating Effective Comments**
* 
**Mentor Effective Commenting**: Move participants past “voting and venting” behaviors toward contributing substantive information they possess.


* 
**Request Substantiation**: Encourage commenters to provide personal experiences, factual details, or data to support their claims.


* 
**Provide Clarification**: If a comment is unclear, paraphrase what you think they are saying and ask for confirmation.


* 
**Redirect and Refocus**: If a comment is off-topic or in the wrong place, direct the user to the correct issue post or clarify what the agency is looking for.



### **Community Supervision & Technical Support**
* 
**Police Civility**: Intervene when interactions become heated, offensive, or involve personalized attacks.
", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: sweet-bond
logs.text: That was actually enjoyable as you showed enough genuine interest to address my actual view and I love R&M. Its 3am though, I need to sleep, please give me a day?

logs.name: ferocious-basin
logs.text:
>Fuck you for sending society back another century

>Nothing pro-trump has come to me as rational thought and looks like pure, genuine hate.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ROF644JklTM

pheew, rick. That looked so hateful. That was scary and hateful and... scary. Like looking back at the KKK back in the... the days when... they did all the bad stuff oooo-weee.(not my best morty impression but whatever)

> The internet and its trolls fail to follow your norms, honestly,

The internet and the trolls helped elect him, along with wikileaks(mostly wikileaks, otherwise the propaganda machine would have chugged on unabated). This section honestly made no sense and I'll chalk it up to the mentioned anger in writing it(the lack of making sense, not the sentiment expressed).

>Enjoy the ensuing shitstorm because we were touting peace as our motto the whole goddamn time

>IF YOU FOLLOW ANY MAJOR RELIGION (...) Then you may contribute to society.

>We can stop calling you bigots or any variation of that term when those people stop existing.

>because its fucking simple as shit, and you can continue being a piece of shit. Bye.

OOOH-WEE that's some peaceful rhetoric there. I tell ya, when I get mad I totally say things I don't already believe too. Anger doesn't just hype up the things you already believe, no sir-ee. You're a peaceful person when you aren't raging-mad.

If you are that willing to abandon peace the moment you don't get your way, you weren't offering peace, you were offering surrender. That's not how this works. That's not how any of this works.

>We are effectively destroying NAFTA and opening a can of worms, so thank you guys for that.

Yeah, that shitshow and all the other corporation-propping shit laws can go die. Corporations and banks and all those huge conglomerations of greed that are bleeding away any semblance of freedom in peoples' lives(putting all your hours up for grabs for a bare-bones $9-10 an hour so you can't schedule anything outside of the next 2 weeks because is a pretty solid example I have from my past) and ruining even the economy itself(like those beautiful bubbles that keep popping because of the shitty laws we have protecting businesses and allowing them to do whatever they want with debts that they keep racking up against american citizens). But yeah no NAFTA and the TPP are great for the working man and the economy in general. Totally. Yeah.

By the way I was angry while writing this too. You won't find me backtracking on anything said here, save for tone perhaps. Hopefully you don't try to do so either.

EDIT: To respond to your comments about pence in another reply, I have two things.

1:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NDsvnMtVS5w

2: As a liberal atheist who is pro-choice and anti goverment-controlled marraige(for anyone), I don't find him scary. At all.

logs.name: sweet-bond
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? You think you're some kind of expert on everything just because you watched a YouTube video? Newsflash, buddy: just because you watched a video doesn't make you an expert. And by the way, what's with the 'I'm a liberal atheist' label? That's just a fancy way of saying you're a hypocrite who only cares about being PC. And by the way, I'm not'scary', I'm just telling it like it is. You're the one who's being close-minded and intolerant. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text:
"User sweet-bond, could you please provide more context or evidence to support your claims? It helps to build a constructive dialogue when we have factual information or personal experiences to back up our statements.

User ferocious-basin, your comments seem to be quite emotional. Could you provide more specific examples or evidence to support your points? This will help others understand your perspective better and contribute to a more informed discussion."

This approach encourages both users to provide substantiated information while maintaining a respectful and constructive tone.

logs.name: light-lerp
logs.text: "Wow, what a bunch of sensitive snowflakes. @sweet-bond, you think you're some kind of expert just because you watched a YouTube video? Please, that's like me saying I'm a brain surgeon because I played a few rounds of 'Operation' as a kid. And @moderator, nice try to keep the peace, but this guy's just spewing hate and you're just enabling him. Can't you see he's just trolling for attention? This whole thread is just a bunch of whiny, entitled people who can't even be bothered to form a coherent argument. And by the way, @ferocious-basin, your 'evidence' is just a bunch of conspiracy theories and half-baked opinions. Get over yourself, dude."

logs.name: ferocious-basin
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @light-lerp? You think you're some kind of expert just because you can string together a few words? I've lived through the struggles of growing up in a poor Cuban household, and I know what it's like to be marginalized and oppressed. Your little 'Operation' game doesn't even begin to compare to the real-life experiences of people like me. And as for my 'evidence', it's not just some conspiracy theories, it's my personal story and the stories of countless others who've been hurt by the system. You can't just dismiss our experiences like they mean nothing. And by the way, @moderator, you're not doing enough to keep the trolls in check. This thread is getting out of hand."

Let's aim to maintain a respectful and constructive dialogue."
